title: Vary Header & Cache Fragmentation
description: Deconstruct the purpose and impact of the Vary header in caching. Analyze how headers like Accept-Encoding and User-Agent contribute to cache fragmentation. Implement strategies to mitigate cache fragmentation and improve cache hit ratios.
objectives: Deconstruct the purpose and impact of the Vary header in caching.
Analyze how headers like Accept-Encoding and User-Agent contribute to cache fragmentation.
Implement strategies to mitigate cache fragmentation and improve cache hit ratios.
